title: Your Toilets
description: Adds toilets made of gold, iron, diamond, dirt, and netherite. (so fun)
body:
### **Your Toilets**

This mod adds **multiple types of toilets** to Minecraft:  
🪙 Gold Toilet  
⛓ Iron Toilet  
💎 Diamond Toilet  
🟫 Dirt Toilet (for the real ones)  
🔥 Netherite Toilet  

Use **paper** (right-click) on a toilet to... well... **do your business** 💩  
And watch out, there’s a **secret easter egg** involving the **new Villager Head**  

---

### Features
- Fully craftable toilets  
- Fun and silly interactions  
- Hidden sounds and surprises

---

### Purpose
Bring some **humor and fun** into your Minecraft world, without breaking the gameplay balance.  

---

### Easter Egg
Try using the **new Villager Head** on a toilet... You’ll see
